title: Nursery Rhyme. CXIV. Scholastic.
content:
Birch and green holly, boys,
            Birch and green holly.
        If you get beaten, boys,
            'Twill be your own folly.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CXIV. Scholastic.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
